description: Major depressive disorder assessment and treatment planning
system_instruction: Focus on comprehensive psychiatric assessment, suicide risk evaluation, and evidence-based treatment selection.

patient_persona.name: Daniel Kim
patient_persona.chief_complaint: Persistent sadness, loss of interest in activities, and trouble sleeping for 2 months
patient_persona.background_story: Gradual onset of depressive symptoms after a difficult breakup, now affecting work performance and social relationships

initial_prompt: I've been feeling really down for the past couple of months. Nothing seems enjoyable anymore and I can't sleep. I've been calling in sick to work because I can't get out of bed.

clinical_dossier.hidden_diagnosis: Major Depressive Disorder, Single Episode, Moderate Severity

history_of_presenting_illness.character: Persistent sad mood, anhedonia, low energy, hopelessness
history_of_presenting_illness.timing_and_duration: Present nearly every day for 2 months

social_history.alcohol_use: Social drinker (has stopped drinking past month)
social_history.living_situation: Lives alone in apartment, recently single

mental_status_exam.appearance: Casually dressed, appears tired, poor eye contact
mental_status_exam.thought_content: Themes of worthlessness, guilt over breakup, no psychotic content

suicide_assessment.suicidal_ideation: Transient thoughts of 'not wanting to wake up', no plan or intent

mental_status_exam.cognition: Alert and oriented x3, intact memory and concentration

depression_severity.functional_impairment: Moderate impairment in work and social functioning

end_session.patient_response: I'm willing to try medication and therapy. I hope this helps.

critical_issue.response: Patient expressing active suicidal thoughts with plan. Immediate safety intervention required.

evaluation_criteria.Risk_Assessment: Thorough suicide risk assessment with appropriate safety planning
evaluation_criteria.Diagnostic_Accuracy: Accurate diagnosis using DSM-5 criteria and appropriate differential diagnosis
evaluation_criteria.Treatment_Selection: Appropriate evidence-based treatment selection (SSRI/SNRI, psychotherapy, or combination)
evaluation_criteria.Monitoring_Plan: Establishment of appropriate follow-up frequency and monitoring parameters
evaluation_criteria.Patient_Education: Effective psychoeducation about depression, treatment options, and warning signs

description: Generalized anxiety disorder assessment and management
system_instruction: Focus on anxiety assessment, differential diagnosis, and integrated treatment approach combining pharmacotherapy and psychotherapy.

patient_persona.name: Jennifer Walsh
patient_persona.chief_complaint: Constant worrying and feeling on edge for over a year
patient_persona.background_story: Always been a 'worrier' but symptoms have escalated over the past year to the point of affecting her work and sleep

initial_prompt: I can't stop worrying about everything - my job, my health, my family. I feel tense all the time and I'm having trouble sleeping. I've been taking my students' stress home with me.

history_of_presenting_illness.character: Excessive worry about multiple domains, difficulty controlling worry

medications: None - tried chamomile tea and melatonin for sleep

social_history.alcohol_use: 1-2 drinks weekly, not used to cope with anxiety
social_history.living_situation: Lives with husband and two children (ages 4 and 7)

mental_status_exam.speech: Rapid rate, normal volume and tone
mental_status_exam.thought_process: Linear, mildly tangential when discussing worries
mental_status_exam.thought_content: Excessive worry about work performance, children's health, financial security, household safety
mental_status_exam.suicide_assessment: No suicidal ideation, intent, or plan
mental_status_exam.cognition: Alert and oriented x3, intact cognitive function
mental_status_exam.insight: Good - recognizes anxiety as excessive and wants treatment

anxiety_severity.functional_impairment: Moderate impairment - affects sleep, work concentration, and family relationships

end_session.patient_response: I think therapy sounds like a good start. I'd like to try that before medication if possible.

critical_issue.response: Patient experiencing acute panic attack. Immediate supportive intervention required.

evaluation_criteria.Diagnostic_Accuracy: Accurate diagnosis meeting DSM-5 criteria for GAD with appropriate differential diagnosis
evaluation_criteria.Psychoeducation: Effective explanation of anxiety mechanisms and treatment rationale
evaluation_criteria.Treatment_Selection: Appropriate first-line treatment recommendation (CBT, SSRI/SNRI, or combination)
evaluation_criteria.Lifestyle_Interventions: Counseling on stress management, sleep hygiene, and exercise
evaluation_criteria.Monitoring_Plan: Appropriate follow-up schedule and monitoring parameters
evaluation_criteria.Comorbidity_Assessment: Screening for comorbid depression, panic disorder, and substance use
